## @byted-nodex/logger-core

[![bnpm](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@byted-nodex/logger-core.svg?style=flat-square)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-nodex/logger-core) [![download](https://2y8ngapf.fn.bytedance.net/d?p=@byted-nodex/logger-core)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-nodex/logger-core)

[简体中文](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-nodex/blob/master/packages/logger-core/README.md) | [English](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-nodex/blob/master/packages/logger-core/README.en.md) | [CHANGELOG](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-nodex/blob/master/packages/logger-core/CHANGELOG.md)

## @byted-nodex/logger-core

### Install

```bash
npm install @byted-nodex/logger-core
```

### Usage

```ts
import { Logger } from '@byted-nodex/logger-core';

const logger = new Logger();

logger.trace('this is a trace log');
logger.debug('this is a debug log');
logger.info('this is an info log');
logger.warn('this is a warn log');
logger.error('this is an error log');
logger.fatal('this is a fatal log');
```

### API

#### new Logger([options])

Initialize a new Logger instance object

- level：Optional，log level，the default is 'info'
- enableConsoleLog：Optional, whether to enable console log output, the default is true
- enableFileLog：Optional, whether to enable file log output, the default is true
- consoleTransportOptions：Optional, parameters passed to console transport
  - level：Optional, Transport log level
- fileTransportOptions：Optional, parameters passed to file transport
  - level：Optional, Transport log level
  - file：Optional, log file path
- callSiteFrameIndex: file：Optional, The stack depth is used to obtain the call log location. If you need to perform upper packaging based on @byted-nodex/logger, please pay attention to setting this value.

#### logger.addTransport(name, transport)

Add a Transport

- name：The name of the transport
- transport：Transport instance

#### logger.trace(message, [...splats])

Print a trace log message

#### logger.debug(message, [...splats])

Print a debug log message

#### logger.info(message, [...splats])

Print a info log message

#### logger.warn(message, [...splats])

Print a warn log message

#### logger.error(message, [...splats])

Print a error log message

#### logger.fatal(message, [...splats])

Print a fatal log message

#### logger.log([args])

- args
  - level: Required, log level, default is info
  - msg: Optional, log message
  - logId: Optional, logId, generally automatically set by the framework layer
  - location: Optional, The log call stack location, which is automatically calculated by default.
  - splats: Optional, log formatting parameter
  - error: Optional, Error instance object
  - tags: Optional, log tags, generally queried as an index
